title: Cries of Silence

sections.label: Intro
lines: "Do not be still, O voice of the void,
The winds carry cries, unseen yet heard."

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Enemies rise like whispers in the night,
Plotting shadows where no light survives.
They conspire with the tongues of ash,
Their breath devours the fragile sky.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: Their banners rise, their fury burns,
Like a fire in the hollowed hills.
They say, “Let their names be erased,
Let the earth forget their song.”

sections.label: Chorus
lines: But You, O Keeper of storms, awake,
Let them scatter like chaff on the wind.
Let their faces burn with shame,
Until they seek Your name again.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: The mountains quake with ancient grief,
The rivers mourn for what they've lost.
Their voices call, but no one hears,
The silence swallows the cost.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Make them as the tempest flees,
As leaves in the chaos of the gale.
For they sought the dust of conquest,
But found the weight of their betrayal.

sections.label: Final Chorus
lines: But You, O Keeper of storms, awake,
Let them scatter like chaff on the wind.
Let their faces burn with shame,
Until they seek Your name again.

sections.label: Outro
lines: "And the world will know Your shadow’s grace,
As the winds erase what the darkness traced."

styleNote: Ambient Guitar Swells · Fade Into Ethereal Echoes · Faint Whispers Repeating
